def negative_third_party_exception_type_leaks_across_architecture_boundary():
    rule_id = "third_party_exception_type_leaks_across_architecture_boundary"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag public or upper-layer APIs that expose low-level library exception types instead of stable local contracts."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
